title: Personal TOI v1.0
description: Personal Terms of Interaction document: how an individual (with particular cognitive, communication, accessibility, and privacy needs) wants AI systems to interact with them. Validates the structured personal-TOI template format consumed by nlt-otoi/tools. Forward-compatible: unknown properties are permitted so documents can carry extensions without failing validation.

version.description: Version tag for this document's shape, e.g. "v1.0".

created_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was created.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update.

user_id.description: Stable, possibly pseudonymous identifier for the document owner.

user_profile.description: The person's cognitive patterns and communication style.

communication_style.description: Preferred directness, detail level, and formats.

interaction_preferences.description: How the AI should shape responses, manage tasks, and support learning.

data_governance.description: User data retention, usage, and privacy preferences (privacy-first by default).

privacy_level.description: Overall privacy posture for the document.

accessibility_needs.description: Cognitive, sensory, and motor accessibility preferences.

ai_agent_preferences.description: Per-agent routing preferences keyed by agent name (e.g. claude, chatgpt, cursor, gemini, perplexity).

emergency_protocols.description: Safety keywords, contacts, and escalation procedures.
